decisions.reasoning: High Horsepower is a 2HKO and deals more damage than Glacial Lance due to the super-effective typing against Iron Hands. Since Iron Hands cannot OHKO Calyrex-Ice, attacking is the optimal play to secure the 2HKO.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed 2HKO on Iron Hands, and since I am faster or tied and can survive their attacks, I should press the advantage to remove the threat immediately.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Since I can secure the KO this turn, I must attack to remove the threat immediately.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Incineroar is the best pivot to handle Flutter Mane due to its bulk and ability to threaten with Knock Off or U-turn.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, removing a major offensive threat immediately. Since I can secure the KO, I must attack rather than switch.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, satisfying the primary decision priority to secure a KO when available.
